__data.skilldesc:
After channeling for 3s, teleport to the target allied Turret, Base, Minion, or trap and gain 60% extra Movement Speed (decays over 3s) afterward.
If the channeling is canceled or interrupted, 30s of the spell cooldown will be <font color="62f8fe">refunded</font>.
__data.skilldescemblem:
After channeling for 3s, teleport to the target allied Turret, Base, Minion, or trap and gain 60% extra Movement Speed (decays over 3s) afterward.
If the channeling is canceled or interrupted, 30s of the spell cooldown will be <font color="62f8fe">refunded</font>.

__data.skilldesc: For 3s, gain 35% <font color="62f8fe">Damage Reduction</font> and deal 35% <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> back to the attacker each time you receive damage.
__data.skilldescemblem: For 3s, gain 35% <font color="62f8fe">Damage Reduction</font> and deal 35% <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> back to the attacker each time you receive damage.

__data.skilldesc: Remove all debuffs (excluding Suppression) and gain <font color="62f8fe">Control Immunity</font> and 15% Movement Speed for 1.2s.
__data.skilldescemblem: Remove all debuffs (excluding Suppression) and gain <font color="62f8fe">Control Immunity</font> and 15% Movement Speed for 1.2s.

__data.skilldesc:
Deal 100 (+10*Hero Level) plus 13% of the target's lost HP as <font color="ffe63c">True Damage</font> to the target enemy hero.
This damage <font color="62f8fe">ignores shields</font>. If the target is slain by this skill, the cooldown will be reduced by 40%.
__data.skilldescemblem:
Deal 100 (+10*Hero Level) plus 13% of the target's lost HP as <font color="ffe63c">True Damage</font> to the target enemy hero.
This damage <font color="62f8fe">ignores shields</font>. If the target is slain by this skill, the cooldown will be reduced by 40%.

__data.skilldesc: Fire a Flaming Shot in the target direction, <font color="62f8fe">knocking back</font> nearby enemies and dealing 200<font color="62f8fe"> (+0.5 Total Magic Power)</font>-680<font color="62f8fe"> (+1.7 Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> (scales with flying distance) to the first enemy hero or creep hit.
__data.skilldescemblem: Fire a Flaming Shot in the target direction, <font color="62f8fe">knocking back</font> nearby enemies and dealing 200<font color="62f8fe"> (+50% Total Magic Power)</font>-680<font color="62f8fe"> (+170% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> (scales with flying distance) to the first enemy hero or creep hit.

__data.skilldesc: Blink a fixed distance in the target direction and gain 5 (+1*Hero Level) extra Physical & Magic Defense afterward for 1s.
__data.skilldescemblem: Blink a fixed distance in the target direction and gain 5 (+1*Hero Level) extra Physical & Magic Defense afterward for 1s.

__data.skilldesc: Summon a Healing Spring that surrounds the hero and lasts 4s, restoring 2.5% Max HP every 0.4s to affected allied heroes (including self), and increasing <font color="62f8fe">Shield and HP Regen</font> effects received by 25% (this effect cannot stack).
__data.skilldescemblem: Summon a Healing Spring that surrounds the hero and lasts 4s, restoring 2.5% Max HP every 0.4s to affected allied heroes (including self), and increasing <font color="62f8fe">Shield and HP Regen</font> effects received by 25% (this effect cannot stack).

__data.skilldesc: Gain 50% extra Movement Speed and <font color="62f8fe">Slow Immunity</font> for 6s.
__data.skilldescemblem: Gain 50% extra Movement Speed and <font color="62f8fe">Slow Immunity</font> for 6s.

__data.skilldesc: Deal 100 (+15*Hero Level) <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to nearby enemies, <font color="62f8fe">petrify</font> them for 0.8s, and slow them by 50% for 0.8s afterward.
__data.skilldescemblem: Deal 100 (+15*Hero Level) <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to nearby enemies, <font color="62f8fe">petrify</font> them for 0.8s, and slow them by 50% for 0.8s afterward.

__data.skilldesc:
Deal 520 (+80*Hero Level) <font color="ffe63c">True Damage</font> to the target Creep or Minion.
<font color="62f8fe">Passive</font>: Increases Creep rewards by 60% and reduces damage taken from basic Creeps by 40%. Also grants 15% additional Damage Reduction in the allied jungle during the first 2 min. Cannot share Minion rewards with allied heroes in the first 5 min.
<font color="62f8fe">Blessing:</font> Accumulate 5 Creep kills, hero kills, or assists to upgrade the spell according to the Jungling Boots' Blessing, and <Num9> kills or assists to gain <Num10> Physical Attack and Magic Power and <Num11> Max HP.
__data.skilldescemblem:
Deal 520 (+80*Hero Level) <font color="ffe63c">True Damage</font> to the target Creep or Minion.
<font color="62f8fe">Passive</font>: Increases Creep rewards by 60% and reduces damage taken from basic Creeps by 40%. Also grants 15% additional Damage Reduction in the allied jungle during the first 2 min. Cannot share Minion rewards with allied heroes in the first 5 min.
<font color="62f8fe">Blessing:</font> Accumulate 5 Creep kills, hero kills, or assists to upgrade the spell according to the Jungling Boots' Blessing, and <Num9> kills or assists to gain <Num10> Physical Attack and Magic Power and <Num11> Max HP.

__data.skilldesc:
For up to 8 Basic Attacks within the next 5s, increase Attack Speed to 1.5 times and the Attack Speed cap to 500%.
The Basic Attacks also <font color="62f8fe">ignore</font> 8 (+1*Hero Level) of the target's <font color="ffe63c">Physical Defense</font> and restore 60<font color="fba51f">(+0.15 Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="62f8fe">(+0.15 Total Magic Power)</font> HP on hit.
__data.skilldescemblem:
For up to 8 Basic Attacks within the next 5s, increase Attack Speed to 1.5 times and the Attack Speed cap to 500%.
The Basic Attacks also <font color="62f8fe">ignore</font> 8 (+1*Hero Level) of the target's <font color="ffe63c">Physical Defense</font> and restore 60<font color="fba51f">(+15% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="62f8fe">(+15% Total Magic Power)</font> HP on hit.
